response.original_title: What do I do if I lost my Uphold authenticator app?
response.overview: If you lost your Uphold authenticator app, Call ☎️1-858-423-8635 you must regain access by submitting a support request to Uphold to reset your 2FA. Use your backup recovery codes or call ☎️1-858-423-8635  if you saved them during setup; otherwise, you will need to complete a identity verification process (KYC) to prove ownership of the account and disable the old 2FA or more details contact ☎️1-858-423-8635.
response.title: What do I do if I lost my Uphold authenticator app?
